findings.summary: 20 findings across 5 files: 3 critical fire-and-forget saves (IPC-001, IPC-002, IPC-003), 4 high-severity race conditions (IPC-005, IPC-006, IPC-008, IPC-016), 2 dual-source-of-truth issues (IPC-004, IPC-009), test gap (IPC-019)
handleSave calls async onSave without await — dialog closes before persistence completes. Same pattern in dialog-edit-agent.tsx:59
Add MCP server does NOT write to electron-store — servers lost on restart. SDK-only add is transient
MCP edit writes store before SDK, has no rollback. Delete has 3 ops with no transaction boundary
Dead installCli bridge method — handler removed from ipc.ts but preload still exposes it
Generic store-set has no runtime schema validation — any non-reserved namespace can be written by compromised renderer
